paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, with a change of -1.05 percent compared to the prior close and -24.28 percent over a window of 21 sessions. There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. This news was reported by TradingView on July 21, 2026. Additionally, there have been recent social posts, including a discussion thread about Fermi America and a mention of Google's increased FY26 CapEx guide.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. The company has also filed forms 8-K and SCHEDULE 13G, and has issued $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
